forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7619,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":121},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773067784,"author_reply_time":1773067928,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610069395686064920","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我真的超爱这种自带“小补丁”的文！
以前看小说，主角把关键剧情随便写在本子上，我好担心会被别人看到。虽然没写出事，但我也总觉得设定不够严谨。但这篇完全不会！作者超用心，会把这种细节都安排得稳稳当当，设定超严谨，逻辑也闭环，看得我很安心！
最难得的是，主角一直都是自己人生的主角，不会被原本的剧情推着走。很多文虽然说是要融入主线，全程在帮主角团，跟着主角团的视角走，但看多了真的会觉得套路差不多，很容易撞梗、感觉雷同。但这篇不一样，里面有特别多原创内容，完全不套路，不是一味地去拯救别人。写得真的超棒！金手指强度也刚刚好，不会开得太夸张，也不会弱到没用，读起来特别舒服。
太好看啦，大大继续加油！🌹🌹"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771860258,"group_id":"7582670112386190361","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"求爱者郁郁寡欢。无爱者逍遥自在","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7hNdd6YtNow6mSNTa/8JWZ35QJ68cEWCLUFiklTtgY+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/788daf5ce77a4e20ab357e2b48ebf387~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623973&x-signature=lXeXiNhuBDylNPNNa7jNKpbtMWo%3D","user_id":"2853988139012835","user_name":"vfhjds"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2853988139012835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582670112386190361","book_info":{"abstract":"（主文野咒回柯南网王，各片场占比差不多，踢很多便当）
